title: Root→audit-trail handoff record (design-doc-autofix)
description: Single JSONL record appended to .scratch/handoff.jsonl by the root coordinator after applying an autofix-tagged finding to a design-doc path (docs/system-design.md or docs/adr/*.md). The record exists so (a) SDE can audit the trail on its next dispatch, (b) the code-quality-gate linter can statically re-validate the change against the autofix allowlist, and (c) the direct-edit detector can confirm that every diff on design-doc paths has a matching authorisation record.

author.description: Pinned to root. Only the root coordinator may apply autofixes on design-doc paths; specialist agents (SDE excepted) never write to these files.

file.description: Absolute-relative-to-repo-root path of the file the autofix touched. Must match one of the design-doc paths declared in the doc-review skill.

category.description: Which autofix category the source finding falls under. The allowlist is the closed enum below — any other category is not autofix-eligible on design-doc paths and must route to SDE.

source_finding.description: Copy of the doc-reviewer finding that authorised this autofix. Self-contained so the audit trail does not depend on resolving back-references into review-feedback records.

fix.description: The literal replacement string the doc-reviewer proposed. Root applies this verbatim via Edit; it does not paraphrase or improve the fix.

old_content.description: Literal pre-edit string (the Edit tool's old_string). Used by the linter to re-derive the diff for static validation.

new_content.description: Literal post-edit string (the Edit tool's new_string). Must equal source_finding.fix byte-for-byte — root applies the doc-reviewer's fix verbatim.

lines_changed.description: Count of lines changed by this autofix. Capped at 5 by the autofix allowlist — anything larger is not autofix-eligible.

chars_changed.description: Count of characters changed by this autofix. Capped at 200 — anything larger is not autofix-eligible.
